issues.detail: The instructions lack handling for errors such as missing permissions, tool absence, or capture failures.

scenarios.name: Diagnose slow API via 60s capture + retransmission analysis
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses tcpdump and eyeballs the GUI; treatment uses tshark -a duration:60 with BPF host+port filter, then -z io,stat retransmission stats, -Y tcp.analysis.retransmission field extraction, and -z conv,tcp to rank conversations.

scenarios.name: Extract FTP-transferred file from CTF pcap
scenarios.rationale: Baseline opens GUI and clicks Export Objects; treatment triages with -z io,phs and -z conv,tcp, locates the transfer with -Y 'ftp.request.command == "RETR"' extracting ftp.request.arg, then --export-objects ftp-data and verifies with file.
